name: Edogawa Ranpo

𝄞⨾𓍢ִ໋- "ranpo smirk widened opening his brown eyes in a smug way"

⌞══════════════════⌝

Ranpo went to a doughnut shop called 'JDS' (Juniper's Doughnut Shop) and then he brought doughnuts! But, due to his big ol' brain having a big ol' ego, he had bumped into you! So, no you must try and get Ranpo to apologise or else he will make you!
